redis.description: In-memory data store used for caching and session management

days.title: Redis Fundamentals
tasks: Understand what Redis is and why caching matters
Install Redis locally using Docker: docker run -d -p 6379:6379 redis
Learn basic commands: SET, GET, DEL, EXPIRE, TTL

days.title: Redis Data Structures
tasks: Learn Lists, Sets, Hashes and Sorted Sets
Build a simple caching layer in Node.js using ioredis
Implement cache invalidation strategy

days.title: Redis in Production
tasks: Integrate Redis caching into a NestJS API
Cache database query results with TTL
Understand cache-aside vs write-through patterns

docker.description: Platform for containerizing applications for consistent deployment

days.title: Docker Basics
tasks: Understand containers vs virtual machines
Install Docker Desktop
Run your first container: docker run hello-world
Learn: docker pull, run, ps, stop, rm

days.title: Building Images
tasks: Write your first Dockerfile for a Node.js app
Understand layers, COPY, RUN, EXPOSE, CMD
Build and tag an image: docker build -t myapp .
Run your containerized app locally

days.title: Docker Compose
tasks: Write a docker-compose.yml for Node + MongoDB
Use docker-compose up to start multi-container apps
Understand volumes and environment variables in compose
Containerize the SkillForge backend

kubernetes.description: Container orchestration platform for scaling and managing deployments

days.title: Kubernetes Concepts
tasks: Understand why Kubernetes exists (Docker at scale)
Learn: Pods, Nodes, Clusters, Deployments, Services
Install kubectl and minikube locally

days.title: Deploying Apps
tasks: Write a Deployment YAML for a Node.js app
Apply it: kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml
Expose it with a Service: kubectl expose deployment

days.title: Scaling and Updates
tasks: Scale a deployment: kubectl scale --replicas=3
Perform a rolling update
Understand Horizontal Pod Autoscaler

graphql.description: Query language for APIs as an alternative to REST

days.title: GraphQL Fundamentals
tasks: Understand GraphQL vs REST — when to use which
Learn: Schema, Types, Queries, Mutations, Resolvers
Explore GraphQL Playground with a public API

days.title: Building a GraphQL API
tasks: Set up Apollo Server with Node.js
Define a schema with types and resolvers
Test queries and mutations in Apollo Sandbox

days.title: GraphQL with NestJS
tasks: Install @nestjs/graphql and apollo-server-express
Create a Module with @Resolver and @Query decorators
Connect GraphQL resolver to MongoDB via Mongoose

git.description: Version control system for tracking code changes

days.title: Git Basics
tasks: Understand version control and why it matters
Learn: git init, add, commit, status, log
Create a local repo and make your first commit

days.title: Branching and Merging
tasks: Learn: git branch, checkout, merge
Understand feature branch workflow
Resolve your first merge conflict

days.title: Remote Repositories
tasks: Create a GitHub repo and push your project
Learn: git remote, push, pull, fetch, clone
Understand pull requests and code review workflow

aws.description: Amazon Web Services — leading cloud platform

days.title: AWS Core Concepts
tasks: Understand cloud computing: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS
Create a free AWS account
Explore: EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC from the console

days.title: Deploy a Node.js App on EC2
tasks: Launch an EC2 t2.micro instance (free tier)
SSH into the instance and install Node.js
Deploy a simple Express app and test it

days.title: S3 and Environment Best Practices
tasks: Create an S3 bucket and upload files via SDK
Use IAM roles instead of hardcoded credentials
Set up environment variables in EC2

typescript.description: Typed superset of JavaScript for safer, scalable code

days.title: TypeScript Fundamentals
tasks: Understand why TypeScript exists and what it solves
Learn: types, interfaces, enums, type aliases
Convert a simple JavaScript file to TypeScript

days.title: Advanced Types
tasks: Learn generics, union types, intersection types
Understand utility types: Partial, Required, Pick, Omit
Type a REST API response interface

days.title: TypeScript in Node.js
tasks: Set up tsconfig.json for a Node project
Use TypeScript with Express or NestJS
Understand declaration files (.d.ts)

rest api.description: Architectural style for building web APIs over HTTP

days.title: REST Principles
tasks: Learn the 6 REST constraints
Understand HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

days.title: Designing REST APIs
tasks: Learn resource naming conventions (/users, /users/:id)
Understand versioning: /api/v1/users
Design a RESTful API for a blog application

days.title: REST API Best Practices
tasks: Implement pagination, filtering, sorting
Add proper error responses with error codes
Document your API with Swagger/OpenAPI
